name: Respirator Fit Testing Locations Near West Jordan for Claims

mainEntity.name: Where to get OSHA-compliant respirator fit testing near West Jordan for comp claim?
mainEntity.text: Where to get OSHA-compliant respirator fit testing near West Jordan for comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Intermountain WorkMed in South Jordan (385-887-7200, 1091 W South Jordan Pkwy) and Murray (801-288-4900, 201 E 5900 S) provide respirator fit testing required before claims involving PPE failure.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah OSHA mandates fit testing (Appendix A 1910.134) for respiratory claims alleging inadequate protection. Use these locations for N95/ half-mask tests with medical clearance. Results document employer non-compliance, strengthening negligence arguments in West Jordan factories. Costs may be reimbursable via comp.
